title: 1PDB Coverage Audit
subtitle: What's in 1PDB vs what should be there. Catches silent ingest gaps before they distort downstream reports.
snapshotDesc: Persist the current audit so trends are visible over time.
matrixDesc: Cell format: rows / distinct meters. Sparse cells indicate ingest gaps; click a cell for the underlying SQL.
deficitsDesc: Months whose row count is below the threshold % of the trailing-month median for that site. Current month is reported separately, prorated by elapsed days.
zeroDesc: Active meters whose account_number has never appeared in hourly_consumption. Often a meter_id format mismatch (April 2026 migration didn't fully take), an account-number typo at source, or an orphan meter.
crossDesc: These meters live in the wrong country DB. Investigate and migrate or quarantine.
declaredMissingDesc: Sites listed in country_config but with zero hourly_consumption rows ever. Pre-operational, decommissioned, or ingest gap.
noDeclaredMissing: All declared sites have at least some data.
orphanDesc: Sites with hourly data but no country_config entry. Investigate.
noOrphan: All sites with data are declared.
snapshotsDesc: Audit results saved over time. Click an id for the full detail.
upstreamDesc: Compares Koios v2 data/freshness per site against our last reading. Helps tell apart 'we missed the import' from 'Koios doesn't have it yet'.
